Title: Plane Density
Description: The Plane Density node allows you to define a Density field in function of the distance from a user-defined plane that passes through the field’s origin {0, 0, 0} or through the anchor if the flag IsAnchored is enabled. You can granularly define the Density value using a Curve asset. The PlaneNormal vector determines the direction the plane is facing.

Outputs.Label: Curve
Outputs.Description: Determines the Density value at any distance from the plane.

Outputs.Label: PlaneNormal
Outputs.Description: Determines the direction the plane is facing.
